books.title: The Painted Veil
books.author: W. Somerset Maugham
books.summary: A superficial young woman is found out in an affair by her husband, who then forces her to accompany him on a mission of great risk.

books.title: Tarzan the Terrible
books.author: Edgar Rice Burroughs
books.summary: Tarzan seeks to rescue his kidnapped wife from a lost city hidden in a prehistoric jungle.

books.title: You Can’t Win
books.author: Jack Black
books.summary: Jack Black’s autobiographical account of life “on the road” as a professional thief and hobo during the late 19th century and early 20th century.

books.title: Queen Victoria
books.author: Lytton Strachey
books.summary: A sardonic and generally unflattering biography of Victoria Alexandrina, Queen of England.

books.title: Smoky the Cowhorse
books.author: Will James
books.summary: Smoky, a gray-colored horse, grows into adulthood on the ranges of the American West.

books.title: The Adventures of Sally
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: A young woman comes into an inheritance, loses it all, and finds love along the way.

books.title: Henry VI, Part II
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: King Henry VI marries Margaret of Anjou and further stokes discord within his court.

books.title: The Return
books.author: Walter de la Mare
books.summary: After visiting a graveyard, a man finds his appearance has mysteriously changed.

books.title: Murder in the Maze
books.author: J. J. Connington
books.summary: Twin brothers are found murdered in a maze, and the local Chief Constable must solve the crime.

books.title: The Strange Case of Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
books.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
books.summary: A London lawyer investigates the relationship between a brilliant scientist and a misshapen misanthrope.

books.title: A Negro Explorer at the North Pole
books.author: Matthew Henson
books.summary: The self-told story of the black man who accompanied Robert Peary during the first trip to the North Pole.

books.title: Scarhaven Keep
books.author: J. S. Fletcher
books.summary: A famous actor goes missing on the northern English sea coast.

books.title: Essays
books.author: Errico Malatesta
books.summary: A collection of essays by Errico Malatesta.

books.title: Short Works
books.author: Epictetus
books.summary: A collection of Epictetus’s short works.

books.title: North of Boston
books.author: Robert Frost
books.summary: A collection of Frost’s poetry.

books.title: The Luck of Barry Lyndon
books.author: William Makepeace Thackeray
books.summary: A poor Irish rogue tries to win fame and fortune in the 18th-century English aristocracy.

books.title: Armageddon 2419 A.D.
books.author: Philip Francis Nowlan
books.summary: Adventure hero Buck Rogers battles the forces of the evil Han Empire in 2419 America.

books.title: Poirot Investigates
books.author: Agatha Christie
books.summary: A calculating Belgian detective and his wide-eyed companion investigate and solve a series of mysteries.

books.title: Verses on Various Occasions
books.author: John Henry Newman
books.summary: A collection of poems by John Henry Newman.

books.title: Recollections of Full Years
books.author: Helen Herron Taft
books.summary: Helen Herron Taft, wife of William Howard Taft, the twenty-seventh President of the United States, recalls her life married to one of America’s most influential political figures.
